节点.功能描述: Subscribes service change events. When the state of intelligent voice service changes, the callback is invoked.
注释信息: @param { 'serviceChange' } type - Type of the event to listen for. Only the serviceChange event is supported.
@param { Callback<ServiceChangeType> } callback - Callback is invoked when the event is triggered.

parameters.说明: Type of the event to listen for. Only the serviceChange event is supported.
Callback is invoked when the event is triggered.

注释信息: @param { 'serviceChange' } type - Type of the event to listen for. Only the serviceChange event is supported.
@param { Callback<ServiceChangeType> } [callback] - Callback is invoked when the event is triggered.

parameters.说明: Type of the event to listen for. Only the serviceChange event is supported.
Callback<ServiceChangeType> } [callback] - Callback is invoked when the event is triggered.

节点.功能描述: Obtains an {@link EnrollIntelligentVoiceEngine} instance. This method uses an asynchronous callback to return the EnrollIntelligentVoiceEngine instance.
注释信息: @param { EnrollIntelligentVoiceEngineDescriptor } descriptor - descriptor indicates enroll intelligent voice engine descriptor.
@param { AsyncCallback<EnrollIntelligentVoiceEngine> } callback - the callback used to return the EnrollIntelligentVoiceEngine instance.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - if input parameter type or number mismatch.

parameters.说明: descriptor indicates enroll intelligent voice engine descriptor.
the callback used to return the EnrollIntelligentVoiceEngine instance.

error_codes.description: if input parameter type or number mismatch.
